message:
fix(query): resolve assignee/unassigned mutual exclusion in saved filter merging

When a saved query had --unassigned set and the CLI override supplied
--assignee, the old code OR-ed both flags, returning contradictory
results. Introduce an explicit match on the (assignee, unassigned) pair
so that a CLI --assignee clears saved unassigned and vice-versa, while
leaving both untouched when neither is specified on the CLI.

Adds two unit tests (merge_assignee_override_clears_saved_unassigned,
merge_unassigned_override_clears_saved_assignee) and a full e2e test
that exercises the round-trip through saved-query run with overrides.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
